notes: Sintered silicon carbide (SiC). Density 3.15-3.25 g/cm³, Knoop hardness ~2500 HK (25 GPa). Flexural strength ~350 MPa. Standalone RHAe ~3.0-4.0 per mm vs KE threats — harder than Al2O3 but more expensive. Used in modern lightweight composite arrays (Leopard 2A5+, Challenger 2 TES). Lower density than Al2O3 for weight-critical applications. Fracture toughness K1c ~3.0-4.0 MPa·m^½.
